nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED — do not turn on until UNIPILE_API_KEY is in .env, the Unipile n8n credential is created, and Mary has at least one Unipile LinkedIn account connected. See docs/architecture/OPERATIONS_HANDBOOK.md §14.1 LinkedIn Integration.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger (Webhook)
nodes.notes: Test entrypoint. POST { "lead_id": "..." } to enrich one lead on demand.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.lead_id || null, node_name: 'linkedin_preflight_skip', error_code: 'LINKEDIN_PREFLIGHT_SKIP', error_message: $json.skip_reason || 'unknown', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.name: Unipile Send Invite
nodes.notes: TODO: Replace host with your Unipile tenant host, configure UNIPILE_API_KEY in .env, create Unipile HTTP Header Auth credential in n8n (header: X-API-KEY), replace TODO_UNIPILE_ACCOUNT_ID with the connected LinkedIn account ID from the Unipile dashboard, then re-bind this node to the credential. No credentials block is attached yet — the workflow fails auth until configured.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.id, client_id: $json.client_id || null, unipile_chat_id: $json.unipile_chat_id || null, message_text: $json.invite_note, sent_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: $json.unipile_ok ? 'sent' : 'failed', response_received: false, metadata: { first_message_queued: $json.first_message, error: $json.unipile_error || null } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.id, client_id: $json.client_id || null, channel: 'linkedin', channel_status: $json.unipile_ok ? 'sent' : 'failed', subject: 'LinkedIn invite', message_excerpt: ($json.invite_note || '').slice(0, 200), provider_ref: $json.unipile_chat_id || null, sent_at: new Date().toISOString(), metadata: { error: $json.unipile_error || null } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Parse Unipile Response').first().json.id, node_name: 'unipile_send_failed', error_code: 'LINKEDIN_SEND_FAILED', error_message: ($('Parse Unipile Response').first().json.unipile_error || 'unknown').toString().slice(0, 500), created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
